title: harnessFlow Stage Contract
description: Each entry describes one stage of one route (route × state). Declares which artifacts flow into this stage (from upstream stages) and which artifacts this stage is contracted to produce. gate_predicate is a Python-like boolean that main-skill / Supervisor / Stop-hook can eval before transitioning to next state.

stage_id.description: Unique stage id. Format: <route>-<state>[-<disambiguator>]. e.g. C-IMPL, C-IMPL-CODEREVIEW, B-VERIFY

state.description: One of state-machine.md § 1 closed enum. Must match state-machine exactly (case-sensitive).

skill_invoked.description: Symbolic skill ref using flow-catalog.md § 1.2 prefix convention. e.g. 'SP:brainstorming' / 'ECC:prp-plan' / 'ECC:prp-implement' / 'harnessFlow:verifier' / 'native:Edit'. Use 'multi' if parallel subgroup (list detail in notes).

inputs_required.description: Artifacts consumed by this stage. Each references an upstream stage + artifact_ref (symbolic name from § 1 Artifact Catalog).

from_stage.description: Producer stage_id (must exist elsewhere in stage-contracts.md of same route), or 'external' for user-provided inputs, or '*invariant*' for goal_anchor-like cross-stage invariants

validation.description: Optional verifier_primitive ref (e.g. 'fs.file_exists', 'schema.schema_valid'). If present, main skill calls it before accepting the input.

outputs_produced.description: Artifacts this stage MUST produce before transitioning out.

path_pattern.description: Glob-style path where this artifact lives on disk. Omit for in-memory-only artifacts (e.g. task_dimensions kept on task-board).

schema_ref.description: Optional JSON Schema path (relative to harnessFlow/) for validation.

validation_primitive.description: verifier_primitive ref run during VERIFY stage for this artifact.

gate_predicate.description: Python-like boolean expression. Vars: output artifacts by artifact_ref, task_board fields, verifier_primitive results. Main skill evaluates before transitioning to next state. Example: 'all(outputs_present) AND diff_lines_net < 500'

on_input_missing.description: What to do if any must_exist=true input is absent. BLOCK → Supervisor DOD_GAP_ALERT + PAUSED_ESCALATED. WARN → log + continue. ABORT → terminal ABORTED.

on_output_missing.description: What to do if any output artifact is absent at transition time. Usually BLOCK for gate stages, WARN for optional.

parallel_with.description: Other stage_ids this stage runs parallel with (no blocking order). e.g. C-IMPL and C-IMPL-CODEREVIEW are parallel.

optional.description: If true, this stage can be skipped (e.g. C-MID-RETRO skipped for L, done for XL only).

notes.description: Free-form human-readable caveats, edge cases, links to method3/delivery-checklist sections.
